name: Open Letters Series - Resume Industrial Complex
description: Four open letters exposing the broken hiring system, addressed to each stakeholder
objective: Establish V's intellectual priority; create canonical record; build toward Careerspan as the answer
key_decisions: Format: Open letters to stakeholders, not essays
Order: Founders → Candidates → Talent Pros → Vendors
Tone: Advice-giving, high road, non-adversarial future
Each ~5 min read, staggered weekly publication

workers.description: Open letter to founders/hiring managers explaining why hiring feels broken
Open letter validating candidate pain and redirecting from resume-optimization
Open letter acknowledging TA trap and offering exit path
Warning to HR tech industry + Careerspan acquisition signal
